heroText: Northland believes telematics is an indispensable tool that provides real-time drive performance data through wireless transmission to increase trucking safety while reducing costs. With leading telematics partners, we can deliver a full range of services to our trucking customers, focusing on accident prevention and driver performance.
supportText: For support onboarding your telematics account, please contact support@truckercloud.com or use the chat feature in the bottom right corner.
